title: Arthritis
description: A mod that aims to make your experience more challenging by adding new mechanics such as bleeding, fractures, and other nuisances to spice up your playthroughs
body:
_After "careful" consideration, `0.1.0-beta` or above is put on hold/delayed and there will be no planned update schedule. Due to certain circumstances, I am sorry. I can't extend the idea furthermore or a will to continue. As this mod is used for me to learn Java, and as a beginner, it's hard to manage those spaghetti code and the increasing number of storage to my potato laptop._
-28/6/2025

# Arthritis
### A mod that aims to make your experience more challenging by adding new mechanics such as bleeding, fractures, and other nuisances to spice up your playthroughs
## About

Is Minecraft getting too easy? Wanted a new challenge? This mod extends your world's progression and adding a few challenges and with slight tweaks to existing game mechanics to enhance your experience!

Add a bunch of challenging, qol, and (some not so) fun features to the game while also compliments each other to add a new variety of challenges.

<details>
<summary>Features</summary>
  
### Blocks
Chopping Block:
- Performs Chopping recipes
- In addition, disables most wood-related recipes from being crafted normally
- Can be sat on if right clicked with an empty hand

Drying Net:
- Performs drying recipes
- Affected by time, weather, and biome

### Items
Pebble:
- Players spawn with a pebble in their inventory
- Right-click on Stone blocks to get Flint Shard or another Pebble
- Can inflict **Bleed** and **Fracture**

Flint Shard:
- Can be crafted to or by Flint (3 Flint Shard = 1 Flint)

Fiber:
- Obtainable from crops, leaves, and grass (3.125%)

Dried Fiber:
- Obtainable by drying Fiber using Drying Net
- An equivalent to string

Hatchet:
- A lighter Axe
- Can strip blocks
- Ranging from Flint, Iron, Gold, Diamond, and Netherite

Note: **Fracture** attributes includes inflicting Cripple effect and Fracture effect

### Mob Effects

Bandaged:
- **Work In Progress**
- Slowly remove Bleed & Afterburn by one level every seconds
- Provides a small regeneration

Splinted:
- **Work In Progress**
- Slowly remove Cripple & Fracture by one level every seconds

Afterburn: (Stackable)
- Reduce max health by 0.5 heart every level
- Maximum of 10% entity's max health
- Custom heart (Can be disabled through config)
- Inflicted from fire, lava, burning-related damages

Bleed: (Stackable)
- Slowly hurt entity
- Hurt entity until 25% of their max health (Unless its above or equal to level 5)
- Inflicted from entities

Cripple:
- Slow & weakens entity's leg
- Prevent players from sprinting
- Inflicted from entities and fall damage

Fracture:
- Slow & weakens entity's hand
- Prevent **most** and **non-instantaneous** item use interaction (Like bows, crossbow, trident, and shields)
- Does not apply to food items
- Inflicted from entities and Block Breaking

Insomnia: (Stackable)
- Slow and weakens player (5% each level)
- Blur player vision randomly (Longer blur time each level)
- Stack each day without sleeping

Note:
- Effects marked as `(Stackable)` can stack their level, if not then it can stack their duration

### Others
"Realistic" Block Breaking:
- Applied to block with `> 0.7` hardness by default
- Breaking with hand hurt the player
- Have a chance to inflict Fracture
- Damage scales with block hardness
- Disable block drop for said block

Projectile Boost:
- Hitting a redirectable projectile boost their speed by 5x
- Screen flashes (Disabled by default | Client)

Creeper tweaks:
- Ignites when they're on fire (Unless they're charged creeper)

Throwable Fire Charges:
- Use Gunpowder in your off-hand to make it larger!
- Can be Projectile Boosted

Campfire tweaks:
- Ignites entity (Scaled with `fireDamage` properties)

Stonecutter tweaks:
- Damage the player when stand on it
- Inflict Bleed

</details>

## Disclamer
Mod is in **not completed**. Any changes may apply. Expect bugs to be common!

Also this mod might be heavily unbalanced depending on your playthrough.

[Don't forget to report the issues through this link!](https://github.com/ProstStuff/Issues/issues)

<details>
<summary>Usage</summary>

You are **allowed** to:
- Make a content about/including it (Credit is optional)
- Including it in a modpack (Credit is required/mandatory)
- Add compatibility to other mods (If this mod don't have one)

You are **not allowed** to:
- Claim it as your "own" creation
- Redistribute or modify the base-code without permission of the mod author (Includes commercial and non-commercial purposes)
</details>

<details>
<summary>Frequently Asked Questions</summary>

Will there be Fabric, Forge, Quilt, other mod loader port:
- After the mod left beta
- When i got time
- When i want to

Will there be backporting:
- When i want to
- No.

Inspirations:
- Decaying Winter, Guts & Blackpowder (Roblox)
- Friends
- Mods, games, etc
</details>
